title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Kolte-Patil Developers

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Kolte-Patil Developers
jsonLd.description:
Kolte-Patil Developers has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
